## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New detection rule
- [ ] New host adapter
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes
- [ ] Tests added for any new behavior
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-visible)
- [ ] `docs/` updated (if relevant)
- [ ] For a new rule: root and nested paths are covered (one `**/.x/**` pattern is sufficient); a test case added
- [ ] For a new adapter: `docs/hosts.json` names every shipped file and activation step
- [ ] **Commit messages contain no AI attribution** (no `Co-authored-by:` an AI,
      no "Generated with/by …") — aimhooman keeps AI residue out of its own history
